title: Account Settings
description: Manage your privacy, data, and account preferences
subtitle: Manage your privacy, data, and account preferences

language.title: Language Preference
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the platform

consents.title: Privacy & Consent
consents.description: Manage how we use your data and your consent preferences
consents.termsDescription: Required - You must agree to our terms of service to use the platform
consents.privacyDescription: Required - You must agree to our privacy policy to use the platform
consents.marketingDescription: Optional - Receive promotional emails about new features, offers, and platform updates

dataExport.title: Export Your Data
dataExport.description: Download a complete copy of all your personal data in JSON format (GDPR compliance)
dataExport.errorDescription: Failed to export your data. Please try again.

accountDeletion.title: Delete Account
accountDeletion.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
accountDeletion.warningDescription: All your data will be permanently deleted after a 30-day grace period
accountDeletion.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data after a 30-day grace period
accountDeletion.successDescription: Your account will be deleted after a 30-day grace period

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Update your password to keep your account secure

errors.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
errors.number: Password must contain at least one number
errors.special: Password must contain at least one special character

export.title: Export Your Data
export.description: Download a complete copy of all your personal data in JSON format (GDPR compliance)

privacy.title: Privacy & Consent
privacy.description: Manage how we use your data (you can withdraw consent anytime)

marketing.title: Marketing Communications
marketing.description: Receive promotional emails about new features, offers, and platform updates

analytics.title: Analytics & Performance
analytics.description: Help us improve by allowing anonymous usage analytics and error tracking

personalization.title: Personalization
personalization.description: Personalize your experience with recommendations and customized content

delete.title: Danger Zone
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data

dialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
dialog.warning: This action will schedule your account for deletion:
dialog.dataRemoved: All personal data will be permanently removed
dialog.contentDeleted: Campaigns, reviews, and transactions will be deleted
dialog.cancelable: You can cancel within the grace period

delete.note: Account deletion requests include a 30-day grace period. During this time, you can log in and cancel the deletion request if you change your mind.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: Learn more about how we protect your data
